message:
🌱 Add kyverno: [Bug] [CLI] CRD Support for new Policy Types without mission (#1502)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kyverno-13427-bug-cli-crd-support-for-new-policy-types-without-cluster-connectio",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kyverno: [Bug] [CLI] CRD Support for new Policy Types without Cluster connection",
+    "description": "[Bug] [CLI] CRD Support for new Policy Types without Cluster connection. This issue affects 8+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify kyverno troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your kyverno deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kyverno configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kyverno configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno\nkubectl get configmap -n kyverno -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kyverno\n```\nCurrently it is not possible to use the new Policy Types (ValidatingPolicy, ImageValidatingPolicy, MutatingPolicy, etc...) against a CRD if no cluster connection (with the required CRD installed) is available."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug] [CLI] CRD Support for new Policy Types without…",
+        "description": "Currently it is not possible to use the new Policy Types (ValidatingPolicy, ImageValidatingPolicy, MutatingPolicy, etc...) against a CRD if no cluster connection (with the required CRD installed) is available. So, this PR enables support for applying these new policy types against CRDs even in the absence of a cluster connection. It allows users to work with CRDs locally, making it possible to validate or mutate resources defined by CRDs using Kyverno CLI or in offline environments.\r\n- Enabled\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug] [CLI] CRD Support for new Policy Types… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kyverno -n kyverno --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n kyverno --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Currently it is not possible to use the new Policy Types (ValidatingPolicy, ImageValidatingPolicy, MutatingPolicy, etc...) against a CRD if no cluster connection (with the required CRD installed) is available. So, this PR enables support for applying these new policy types against CRDs even in the absence of a cluster connection.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
